description: Baseline default profile for pi-zflow v1. Uses logical lane names only; model/provider resolution happens at runtime via the profiles extension (Phase 2).

default.description: Default profile — general-purpose planning, implementation, and review.

economy.purpose: Cost-effective lane for routine tasks: implementation, verification, repo mapping, synthesis, plan validation

accelerated.purpose: Higher-capability lane for complex work: planning, hard implementation, code review, plan review

specialist.purpose: Specialist lane for security and system-level analysis — graceful degradation if unavailable
